title: Gestographe
collaboration: Interactive Photographic Installation by Fred Chemama
description:
Dedicated photographic capture software programmed in MaxMSP-Jitter
	                          / Allow the visitors to draw with their bodies using an accumulation effect applied to a live camera stream (pseudo long exposure)
	                          / Visitors witness their creation in real time via a video projection in front of them then it's automatically printed when they stop moving
